section_tag: Where Do You Want to Go?
heading: What do you want from our work together?
subtext: There's no wrong answer. Some people arrive knowing exactly what they want. Others feel that something needs to change but aren't sure what. Both are a perfectly good place to start.
cards: Feel more energetic and vital, day to day
Reach a healthy weight and body composition
Get stronger and more physically capable
My sex life isn't what it used to be
I'm stiff and achey and I'm starting to feel old
Sleep better and wake up actually rested
Understand and improve my health markers
Sharper thinking and better emotional balance
Reduce my risk of serious illness in the future
selected_cta: Good. We'd love to talk about those goals with you.
unsure_text: Not sure what you're looking for yet? That's completely fine. Our short questionnaire can help you think it through.
